Verifier v2 — Task tools + the Agent false-positive

Extends the schema-conformance gate (#2185) to TaskCreate/TaskUpdate. The story is the negative result: why Agent can't be gated, caught before codemodding 250 false positives.
real Task* bugs 5
Agent false-positives 250
tools gated 4
verifier 0 / 343

The verify-the-verifier moment 🛑

Adding Agent to the registry flagged 250 "violations" — but they were not Claude Code's Agent tool. They were CrewAI Agent(role=, goal=, backstory=), OpenAI Agents SDK Agent(instructions=, handoffs=), and LangGraph constructors that ork legitimately documents in crewai-patterns.md, llm-integration, etc. Agent( is fundamentally ambiguous — it collides with third-party agent-framework APIs. So Agent is deliberately excluded (with a comment in the test). Checking the flagged names before codemodding saved 250 wrong edits — the same lesson as the audit.

What it DID catch — 5 real TaskCreate/TaskUpdate bugs ✅

SiteBug → fix
multi-supervisor · fix-issue · implement · verify (×4)TaskCreate(…, addBlockedBy=[…]) → addBlockedBy is a TaskUpdate param. Create first, then TaskUpdate(taskId=…, addBlockedBy=…).
task-dependency-patternsTaskUpdate(status:"cancelled", note:…) → no note param and cancelled isn't a valid status. Use status="completed" + metadata.

The create-then-link fix (example)

Before — addBlockedBy on TaskCreate

TaskCreate(
  subject="Verify implementation",
  activeForm="Verifying changes",
  addBlockedBy=[impl_task_id])   # ✗ not a
                                 #   TaskCreate param

After — create, then link

TaskCreate(subject="Verify implementation",
  activeForm="Verifying changes")
TaskUpdate(taskId=verify_id,
  addBlockedBy=[impl_task_id])   # ✓ deps set
                                 #   after task exists

Registry now

SendMessage      → {to, message, summary}
PushNotification → {message, status}
TaskCreate       → {subject, description, activeForm, metadata}   ← NEW
TaskUpdate       → {taskId, status, subject, description, activeForm,
                    owner, metadata, addBlocks, addBlockedBy}      ← NEW
Agent            → EXCLUDED (collides with CrewAI/OpenAI-SDK/LangGraph Agent())
AskUserQuestion  → owned by test-askuserquestion-schema.sh
